sections.sectionTitle: Topa in Jerusalem Mite A Hehnepna Thu

verses.text: Ka mite hehnem un, hehnem un, na Pasian un ci hi
Dam takin Jerusalem mite hopih un. Amau' gimna hun beita a, amau' mawhna kimaisakin, amau' khialhnate hangin Topa in a kicingin gim pia khinzo ta hi, ci-in amau tungah gen un
Awging khat in, “Gamlakah Topa' lampi sial un la, sehnel gamsungah i Pasian-a' ding lam lianpi khat a tangin bawl un
Kuam khempeuh kivuk dim ding a, mual liante leh mual neute kitotam ding hi. A tamkimlo munte kitamkim sak ding a, suanghum omna munte kizalhtam ding hi
Topa' kam in gen khin ahih manin, Topa' minthan'na vang hong kilang ding a, mi khempeuh in mukhawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Awging khat in, “Kiko in!” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, “Bang thu kiko ding ka hi hiam?” ka ci hi. “Mi khempeuh, lopa bang hi a, ama hoihnate khempeuh gamlakah a om pak tawh kibang lel hi
Topa' hu in a mut ciangin lopa vulin, pak a pulh hi. Mihingte lopa bang lel hi taktak hi
Lopa vul a, pak a pulh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian' thu kho tawntung ding hi,” hong ci hi

Jerusalem aw, mual sang dawnah kahto-in lungdamna thu kiko in. Zion aw, nakpi takin awng in la, lungdamna thu taangko in. Nakpi takin kiko in la, lau kei in. Judah gam khuapite tungah, “Na Pasian uh hong pai ta hi,” ci-in gen ta un
Topa Pasian hong pai a, vangliatna tawh hong uk ding hi. Ama sep thamante hong pua a, a gualzawhna thamante hong masuan hi
Amah in tuucingpa bangin ama tuuhonte an vak ding a, ama tuuhonte kaikhawmin a ang sungah pua ding a, no ngeklai a neite dam takin a paipih ding hi.
Kua in ama khutkuak sungah tuite tehin, ama khap tawh vantung teh a, leitung leivui khempeuh lawh khat sungah guangin, pongkhaina tawh mual liante khai a, tawitehna tawh mual neute teh ahi hiam
Kua in Topa' sep dingteng gen a, thu lamlakpa bangin kua in amah hilh ahi hiam
Thu a kicingin a muhna dingin amah in kua dong ngei a, kua in amah lampi man hilhin, ama tungah thutheihna hilh a, thu theihtelna lampi lak ahi hiam

En un, minamte pen phelkhai khat panin tuimal themkhat a taakkhia tawh kibang a, tawitehna tungah a om leivui nengbaang bangin kingaihsun lel hi. Amah in tuikulhte pen leivui them bangin tawmto lel hi
I Topa biakna dingin Lebanon sing kicinglo ding a, a ganhingte zong meihal biakna dingin kicinglo ding hi
Minam khempeuhte, ama mai-ah bangmah tham hilo a, amaute pen bangmah a omlo leh, a hawmguak sangin a tawmzaw-in amah in a ngaihsun hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian pen kua tawh tehkak ding a, amah pen bang lim tawh kibang ci ding na hi uh hiam
Milim tawh tehtheih ding hilo hi. Milim a bawlpa in sungin, khamseekpa khat in tua milim kham tawh zut a, tua milim-a' dingin ngun khainiangte a sun'sak hi
Ngun leh kham a nei zolo mipa in biakna-in a zat dingin a muatlo ding sing teel a, a taang theilo milim khat ama-a' dingin a bawlsak dingin khutsiam mi khat a zong hi
Note in thei nailo a, za nailo na hi uh hiam? A kipat cilin note tungah hong kigen khin hilo ahi hiam? Leitung a pian'-a kipan thei khinta hilo na hi uh hiam
Leitunga a teng mite kauphe tawh kibang lel hi. Leitung kimkot tungah a tupa, vantungte puan bangin zalin, a sungah a om theihna dingin puanbuk bangin a zalpa
uliante a mawkna suaksakin, leitung ukte pen bangmahlo a suaksakpa amah ahi hi
Amaute pen a gina-in kisuanlo a, a gina-in kivawhlo a, amau' kungte in a gina-in lei sungah zung khalo uh a, amah in a mut ciangin amaute vul a, huihpi in ham bangin amaute a len'khiatpih hi
Tua ahih ciangin kei kua tawh hong genteh ding na hi uh hiam, Siangtho Pa in ci hi

A sangna lam ento un la mu un. Kua in hihte piangsak ahi hiam? Amau' honpite khat khatin piangsakin, a lian ama thahatna tawh amaute khempeuh a minun a sampa ahi hi. Vangliatna-ah thahat ahih manin khat beek pelemlo hi
“ Topa' kiang panin keima lampi kiliah a, keima Pasian in ka lungkhamna hong thudonlo hi,” Jakob aw, bang hangin ci a, Israel aw, hang hangin tuaci pau na hi hiam
Thei nailo a, za nailo na hi hiam? Topa pen tawntung Pasian hi a, leitung mong khempeuh dong a Piangsakpa ahi hi. Amah gimlo a, zong tawllo hi. Ama thu theihtelna kigen zolo hi
Amah in a gim mi tungah vangliatna pia a, thahatna a neilo mi a thahatna khangsak hi
Khangnote nangawn gimin tawl ding a, khanglai mite a tha uh bei ding hi
Ahih hangin Topa a muang mite a tha uh dimkik ding a, muvanlai bangin kha tawh leengto-in, amaute tai napi-un tawllo ding uh a, amaute lam pai napi-un gimlo ding uh hi.
